main.description: A message in a hoop place-thread: the quasi-permanent design feedback / chat log. Messages reference a place by its deterministic placeId so both collaborators' repos contribute to the same thread, and may reference a parent message id to nest replies.

placeId.description: Deterministic place id `<x>-<y>` this message belongs to.

parentId.description: Optional id of the message this replies to (for threading).
